decisions.rationale: Excluded tests/ and cli/ directories from strict-ood. Tests use pytest function-based convention (standalone test functions), CLI uses Typer decorators — both legitimate exceptions.

Excluded tests/ (pytest/mock imports), container/ (composition root wires all layers), and kernel/ (MCP adapter bridges domain to FastMCP infrastructure). These are legitimate hexagonal architecture exceptions.

Rule was using engine_type: tree-sitter with a catch-all (import_from_statement) query that flagged ALL imports as circular violations. Now that the graph analyzer exists, changing to engine_type: graph with query: circular_dependency for real cycle detection. Eliminates 100+ false positives from the baseline.
New rule: production code must use structlog, not print(). Regex engine bans the print( pattern in non-test files.
New rule: wildcard imports (from module import *) pollute namespace and hide dependencies. Regex engine enforces explicit imports.
